name: Navan
description: Navan (formerly TripActions) travel and expense management platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Navan
2. Go to Settings → Integrations → API Tokens
3. Create a new API token with read access
4. Copy the token and paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Generate an API token in Navan → Settings → Integrations → API Tokens

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Navan users to verify travel and expense access is properly managed
